title: salix minutiflora var. pubescens
intro: Salix minutiflora var. pubescens, also known as dwarf willow, is a small shrub-like plant belonging to the Salicaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Salix minutiflora var. pubescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which are commonly used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties.
